overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in traditional attire walking along a moonlit coastal trail. The character enters shallow water, wades through a reflective pool with an overhead camera view, then exits and continues along the rocky shoreline surrounded by grass and cliff formations.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path toward the water's edge, with rocky cliffs to the right and ocean visible to the left

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation lining the right side of the trail
dark blue ocean visible beyond the coastal vegetation
narrow dirt path winding along the coastline
tall green grass and shrubs lining the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dry dirt trail at night, flanked by rocky cliffs on the right and coastal vegetation on the left. The ocean is visible in the distance under a clear night sky, with the path leading toward shallow water ahead.

events.description: character steps from dry trail into shallow reflective water
camera shifts to overhead top-down view while wading through water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water along the coastline, creating ripples with each step

entered.detail: reflective shallow water covering the trail with visible ripples
weathered wooden bench or log structure on the right bank

segments.scene_description: The character enters shallow water, transitioning from the dry trail to a reflective tidal pool. The camera shifts to an overhead view showing ripples around the character's feet, while a wooden bench appears on the right bank and the rocky cliff recedes into the distance.

events.description: character exits shallow water back onto the shore
camera returns to third-person follow view from behind the character

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet shoreline path after exiting the water, heading toward rocky terrain ahead

entered.detail: dark wet dirt trail glistening with moisture from the tidal pool
scattered wooden logs and driftwood on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water, the character returns to land where the trail is now wet and dark. The camera shifts back to a standard third-person follow view. Fallen logs appear on the right side as the character approaches a large rock formation in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal trail with boulder fields

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal trail as it curves through grassy terrain with large rock outcrops

entered.detail: scattered large boulders and rocky outcrops ahead on the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the winding coastal trail, passing through an area with scattered boulders and rocky outcrops. The cliff wall that was on the right now appears on the left as the path curves, with the character approaching larger rock formations ahead under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit coastal trail that transitions from dry land through a reflective tidal pool and back onto a rocky shoreline. It begins with the character walking a dirt path flanked by cliffs and coastal vegetation, moving steadily toward the distant ocean. As the character enters the shallow water, the camera shifts to an overhead perspective, capturing ripples in a reflective pool beside a wooden bench while the cliffs recede. The scene then shifts back to a third-person follow view as the character exits the water onto a dark, wet trail marked by fallen logs and distant rock formations. Finally, the path curves through an area of scattered boulders and rocky outcrops, with the cliff wall shifting from the right to the left side of the frame under the clear night sky.
